title: Surprise From The Deep applies +5 Modifier for one turn cycle

card.rawText: For 1 turn cycle add +5 to Modifier.

plan.title: Surprise From The Deep applies +5 Modifier for one turn cycle
plan.summary: Equip to a creature, verify Modifier bonus affects hit and damage, then expires at the start player's next turn.

notes: Use a non-first-turn-cycle state so combat damage is allowed.
Equip magic to player_1 primary creature.

steps: Play/equip Surprise From The Deep to player_1 primary creature.
Assert equipped creature Modifier increases by 5.
Enter COMBAT and attack player_2 primary creature.
Resolve forced hit and damage rolls.
Advance turns until beginning of player_1 next turn.

expectedAssertions.label: Buff expires after one turn cycle

manualVerification: Confirm duration expires at beginning of the start player's next turn, not immediately after combat.
riskNotes: Path names may vary by fixture; assert via engine battle log if stat path is unavailable.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported route; focus on duration and Modifier participation in both hit and damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
